data.title: Honey Badger Silver Targets European Investors With New Frankfurt Listing
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Honey Badger Exploration ( (TSE:TUF) ).

Honey Badger Silver has secured listings for its common shares on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange and the Tradegate Exchange under the ticker 1QA, expanding access to European investors while maintaining its primary listing on the TSX Venture Exchange and trading on the U.S. OTCQB market. The company expects the additional European listings to boost visibility, liquidity, and shareholder diversification without issuing new shares or diluting existing holders, and has also granted one million stock options to its new chief operating officer as part of his compensation package.

The increased presence in Europe comes as Honey Badger advances its silver projects and positions itself within the silver royalty and streaming space, aiming to tap into Germany’s active precious metals investor base. The stock option grant underscores a focus on strengthening operational leadership as the company seeks to unlock value from its portfolio of historically mineralized properties in Canada.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:TUF) stock is a Hold with a C$0.24 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Honey Badger Exploration stock, see the TSE:TUF Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TUF Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TUF is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, widening losses, and ongoing cash burn), partially offset by a constructive technical setup (price above key moving averages with positive MACD). Valuation remains constrained by negative earnings and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on TUF stock, click here.

More about Honey Badger Exploration

Honey Badger Silver Inc. is a Canada-focused silver company advancing a portfolio of silver-focused projects and exploring opportunities in the silver royalty and streaming sector. Its assets include the Sunrise Lake project in the Northwest Territories, the Plata high-grade silver project in Yukon, the Clear Lake project with historic silver and zinc resources, and significant land holdings around the past-producing Nanisivik Mine in Nunavut.

Average Trading Volume: 402,413

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$34.53M

data.title: Everybody Loves Languages Shareholders Back Take-Private Amalgamation With ELL Ventures
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Lingo Media ( (TSE:ELL) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Everybody Loves Languages Corp. shareholders have approved an amalgamation with ELL Ventures Ltd. to form a new private entity that will retain the Everybody Loves Languages name. Following completion, expected around April 10, 2026, ELL shareholders other than ELL Ventures will have their common shares converted into redeemable preferred shares and cashed out at $0.085 per share.

After the transaction, ELL Ventures’ shareholders will own the amalgamated company, which plans to delist from the TSX Venture Exchange and operate as a private firm. The deal, led by executives who control ELL Ventures, marks a strategic exit from public markets and a shift toward a privately held structure that could provide greater operational flexibility while removing public-market liquidity for current minority shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:ELL) stock is a Buy with a C$0.09 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Lingo Media stock, see the TSE:ELL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ELL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ELL is a Neutral.

The score is primarily supported by improved profitability and positive cash generation alongside a very conservative, debt-free balance sheet. Offsetting this is a mixed technical setup with an extended RSI and negative MACD, plus historical volatility in revenue, margins, and cash flow that reduces confidence in durability. Valuation helps due to the low P/E.

To see Spark’s full report on ELL stock, click here.

More about Lingo Media

Everybody Loves Languages Corp. is a Canada-based edtech company specializing in language learning, edutainment, and content development for educators and students. Through its Everybody Loves Languages Inc. and Lingo Learning Inc. units, it offers SaaS-based eLearning platforms, print materials, and white-label tools, with a strong presence in Latin America and China and partnerships with government and industry bodies.

Average Trading Volume: 131,716

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: C$2.85M

data.title: Advanced Gold Confirms Massive Sulphides and Copper Anomalies at Buck Lake VMS Target
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Advance United Holdings ( (TSE:AUEX) ).

Advanced Gold Exploration has reported assay results from its 2025 diamond drilling program at the Buck Lake Project’s Noranda Zone in Ontario, where work was temporarily halted after completing two of three planned holes due to winter conditions. The drill remains on site for a spring restart, as the company continues to evaluate a previously defined 500-metre massive sulphide zone within a much larger 3,000-metre electromagnetic anomaly.

The new holes intersected massive sulphide zones carrying anomalous copper values, with average grades in the hundreds of ppm range in holes BL-25-01 and BL-25-03, reinforcing Buck Lake’s potential as a VMS-style Cu-Zn system. While one hole missed massive sulphides and may have fallen short of its target, management says the copper “pathfinder” signature across the corridor suggests the current intercepts may lie on the margin of a larger, higher-grade system, underlining the project’s exploration upside for investors and other stakeholders.

More about Advance United Holdings

Advanced Gold Exploration Inc. is a mineral exploration company focused on volcanogenic massive sulphide, or VMS-type, copper-zinc deposits in the Wawa-Abitibi sub-province of Ontario. The company’s flagship Buck Lake Project targets greenstone belt-hosted supracrustal Archean rocks, exploring along a 3 km electromagnetic corridor for Cu-Zn bearing massive sulphide systems comparable in style to historic Kidd Creek and Horne mines.

Average Trading Volume: 21,775

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$3M

See more insights into AUEX stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Ucore Backs Hastings’ Thai Rare Earth Facility to Bolster Western Supply Chain
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Ucore Rare Metals ( (TSE:UCU) ).

Ucore Rare Metals has endorsed its partner Hastings Technology Metals and Wyloo’s acquisition of a fully permitted mixed rare earth chloride production facility in Thailand, which will enable early processing of third-party monazite feedstock ahead of the Yangibana rare earth project. The move is seen as strengthening a diversified, Western-aligned rare earth supply chain and supporting Ucore’s plans for its Strategic Metals Complex in Louisiana.

The company said the acquisition reinforces its previously announced non-binding arrangement with Hastings and Wyloo to progress toward a long-term supply deal for rare earth concentrate to its Louisiana facility. Ucore continues to work with its partners to align commercial terms, product specifications and timelines, as it seeks to integrate upstream supply with its midstream processing and oxide production capabilities to build a mine-to-oxide Western rare earth supply chain.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:UCU) stock is a Sell with a C$5.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ucore Rare Metals stock, see the TSE:UCU Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on UCU Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, UCU is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by weak financial performance (pre-revenue with escalating losses and ongoing cash burn) and bearish technicals (price below all key moving averages with negative momentum). Valuation provides limited support due to negative earnings and no dividend information.

To see Spark’s full report on UCU stock, click here.

More about Ucore Rare Metals

Ucore Rare Metals is a Canadian company focused on rare and critical metal resources, as well as extraction, beneficiation and separation technologies for the mining and mineral extraction industry. The firm aims to become a leading advanced technology provider of metal separation products and services, with plans for rare earth processing facilities in Louisiana, Canada and Alaska, including development of its Bokan-Dotson Ridge rare heavy rare earth project.

An update from TietoEVRY ( (GB:0KG0) ) is now available.

Tieto has repurchased 50,000 of its own shares on the Helsinki Stock Exchange at an average price of EUR 18.7778 per share, for a total consideration of about EUR 938,890. Following this transaction, the company now holds 706,693 treasury shares, with the buyback conducted in line with EU market abuse and share repurchase regulations.

The latest repurchase continues Tieto’s use of share buybacks as a capital management tool, potentially supporting earnings per share and offering flexibility for future uses such as incentive plans or balance sheet optimization. The move may also signal management’s confidence in the company’s valuation and long‑term prospects in the competitive software and digital engineering services market.

data.title: Orexo updates share and voting structure after class C conversion
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Orexo AB ( (SE:ORX) ).

Orexo AB has reported its updated share and vote structure as of the last trading day of March, confirming a total of 37,156,639 shares outstanding. Of these, 35,127,056 are ordinary shares carrying one vote each, while 2,029,583 are class C shares carrying one tenth of a vote per share, resulting in a total of 35,330,014.3 votes in the company.

The change in Orexo’s capital structure stems from a previously announced conversion of class C shares into ordinary shares, completed following the February 19, 2026 decision. By clarifying the composition of share classes and voting rights, the company provides greater transparency for investors and other stakeholders, which is particularly relevant for governance assessments and trading decisions in its Stockholm‑listed and U.S.‑traded securities.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:ORX) stock is a Hold with a SEK21.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Orexo AB stock, see the SE:ORX Stock Forecast page.

More about Orexo AB

Orexo AB is a Swedish pharmaceutical company focused on treatments for severe diseases and life‑saving rescue medications. Its core innovation is AmorphOX, a proprietary drug delivery technology designed to improve bioavailability and stability for both large and small molecules, supporting new administration routes and more efficient manufacturing and distribution. With more than 30 years of experience and multiple globally approved drugs, Orexo runs a diversified pipeline of clinical and preclinical programs in collaboration with research, development, and commercialization partners. The company is headquartered in Uppsala, Sweden, and its shares are listed on Nasdaq Stockholm with American Depositary Receipts traded on the OTCQX market in the United States.

Average Trading Volume: 51,235

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: SEK754.3M

See more data about ORX stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Hershey Unveils One Hershey Strategy at 2026 Investor Day
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The Hershey Company ( (HSY) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On March 31, 2026, The Hershey Company hosted its 2026 Investor Day at the New York Stock Exchange, where executives detailed a strategy to “Lead Next Generation Snacking” through an integrated “One Hershey” commercial model across sweet, salty and functional snacks. Management emphasized a five-year innovation pipeline focused on premium and better-for-you offerings, plans for a more automated and AI-enabled supply chain to boost productivity, and a clear roadmap to restore margins and deliver balanced top- and bottom-line growth.

The company reaffirmed its 2026 full-year guidance, projecting net sales growth of 4% to 5%, organic net sales growth of 2.5% to 3.5% and a sharp rebound in profitability, with reported EPS expected to rise 79% to 89% and adjusted EPS 30% to 35%, partly aided by its 2025 acquisition of LesserEvil. The outlook and strategic agenda underscore Hershey’s intent to sustain top-tier shareholder returns while solidifying its competitive position in the evolving global snacking landscape.

The most recent analyst rating on (HSY) stock is a Hold with a $200.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on The Hershey Company stock, see the HSY Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on HSY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HSY is a Neutral.

HSY scores positively on strong technical momentum and resilient cash generation, but the overall rating is held back by a sharp 2025 margin/earnings reset and a high P/E (~51) that increases downside if recovery is slower than guidance. The earnings call supports the outlook with clear recovery targets for 2026, though cocoa and pricing elasticity remain key risks.

To see Spark’s full report on HSY stock, click here.

More about The Hershey Company

The Hershey Company, listed on the NYSE under ticker HSY, is a global confectionery and snacking manufacturer best known for its iconic chocolate and candy brands. The company is increasingly positioning itself as a diversified snacking player, expanding from traditional sweets into salty, premium, better-for-you and functional snack categories to capture growth across the broader snacking market.

data.description:

An announcement from Canagold Resources ( (TSE:CCM) ) is now available.

On March 31, 2026, Canagold Resources Ltd. filed a Form 6-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission for the month of March 2026, furnishing its annual disclosure package for the year ended December 31, 2025. The submission included management’s discussion and analysis, consolidated financial statements, and the CEO and CFO certifications of those annual filings.

Chief executive officer Catalin Kilofliski certified that the 2025 annual filings were free of material misstatements and fairly presented the company’s financial condition, performance and cash flows. He also confirmed that Canagold’s disclosure controls and internal control over financial reporting were designed and evaluated using the COSO framework, with no reported material weaknesses in design, underscoring the company’s focus on governance and reporting reliability for investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:CCM) stock is a Buy with a C$1.20 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Canagold Resources stock, see the TSE:CCM Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Masonglory Limited Files September 2025 Interim Results, Showing Stronger Balance Sheet
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Masonglory Limited ( (MSGY) ).

On March 31, 2026, Masonglory Limited filed a Form 6-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, furnishing unaudited interim condensed consolidated financial statements as of September 30, 2025 and for the six months ended September 30, 2025 and 2024. The submission also included management’s discussion and analysis and full Inline XBRL data, signaling a step-up in financial transparency and regulatory compliance for shareholders and prospective investors.

The interim figures show that between March 31 and September 30, 2025, total assets rose to $11.65 million from $6.55 million, driven by higher contract assets, prepayments and new machinery, while total liabilities edged down to $2.95 million. Shareholders’ equity more than doubled to $8.70 million, supported by a sharp increase in additional paid-in capital and modestly higher retained earnings, even as revenue and net income for the six-month period declined year-on-year, suggesting capital-structure strengthening despite softer profitability.

More about Masonglory Limited

Masonglory Limited is a Hong Kong-based foreign private issuer listed in the United States, reporting under Form 20-F. The company operates through various subsidiaries and prepares its financial statements in U.S. dollars, indicating an international investor focus, although its specific operating industry and primary products or services are not detailed in this filing.

Average Trading Volume: 943,841

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $6.42M

data.title: Huazhong In-Vehicle Announces Final 2025 Cash Dividend and Key Dates
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Huazhong In-Vehicle Holdings Company Limited ( (HK:6830) ) has issued an announcement.

Huazhong In-Vehicle Holdings Company Limited has proposed a final ordinary cash dividend of RMB 0.002479 per share for the financial year ended 31 December 2025, equivalent to HKD 0.002826 per share based on an exchange rate of RMB 1 to HKD 1.14. The dividend is subject to shareholder approval on 3 June 2026, with the shares trading ex-dividend on 8 June, a book closure from 10 to 12 June, a record date of 12 June, and payment scheduled for 10 July 2026.

The announcement sets out a clear timeline for investors to establish dividend entitlement, reinforcing the company’s practice of returning cash to shareholders while providing transparency on key dates. The board composition, listing details and absence of withholding tax or warrant-related adjustments suggest a straightforward distribution structure for existing shareholders in the Hong Kong market.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:6830) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.23 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Huazhong In-Vehicle Holdings Company Limited stock, see the HK:6830 Stock Forecast page.

More about Huazhong In-Vehicle Holdings Company Limited

Huazhong In-Vehicle Holdings Company Limited is a Hong Kong-listed company in the automotive sector, focusing on in-vehicle products and related components. Its shares trade under stock code 06830, and the company serves investors through the Hong Kong market with ordinary equity securities.
